steps.title: Write salt amounts
steps.content: The low-salt mixture contributes $0.03x$ kilograms of salt. The high-salt mixture contributes $0.92y$ kilograms of salt.

steps.title: Set total salt equal
steps.content: The final mixture has $30$ kilograms at $5\%$ salt, so the total salt is $(0.05)(30)$. Therefore, $$0.03x+0.92y=(0.05)(30)$$ The answer is B.
